---
title: Week 48
subtitle: v1.0.0
engine: jupyter
categories: ['regression', 'calculation', 'data', 'plotting']
colab: true
---

{{< include tidbits/_install_import.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

::::::

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

{{< include exercises/analys-data-set-obeyin.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

::::::

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

{{< include exercises/michaelis-menten.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

::::::

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

{{< include exercises/enzyme-inhib-i.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

::::::

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

{{< include exercises/enzyme-inhib-ii.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

::::::

<!-- ---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

{{< include exercises/snake-dependent-enzyme.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

:::::: -->

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

{{< include exercises/enzyme-behav-atcase.qmd >}}

:::::: {.cell .markdown}

::::::
